titleStmt.title: SII 26.523: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 523. (A.R. No. 496 of 1909.) ŚŌḺAPURAM, SIVAGANGA TALUK, RAMANATHAPURAM DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription records the gift, made by the king, of certain taxes due from the dēvadānās given as dēvadāna-Brahmadēya to the Śrī-Vaishṇavas of the temple by Periyaśīyar, Iḷaiyaśīyar and Ayyar, to provide for food offerings and other services to the image of the goddess set up in the temple of the god Uttamaśōḻaviṇṇagara Āḻvār of Āṇmā-nāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī .
koṉeriṉmaikoṇṭāṉ Āṇmānāṭṭu Uttamacoḻaviṇṇakara Āḻvār koyilil śrīvaiṣṇavarka
ḷukku tevatāṉappiramateyamāka periyaciyarum Iḷaiyaciyarum Ayyarum tantaruḷi tiruvāy keḻvi
ttirumukamum puravariyāruḷvariyum tiruccala ḷiṭṭa tevatāṉaṅkaḷil Iṟuttu varukiṟa Antarāyamu
m viṉiyokam Eḻuntaruḷiviccu pirāṭṭikku tiruppaṭimāṟṟuḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭuvaṉavukku peṟaveṇumeṉ
ṟu Ivaḷ namakkuccoṉṉamaiyil Ivaḷukkāka Antarāyam patiṉaiñcāvatiṉetirā māṇṭu mutal tantom muṉpu
Iṟukkakkaṭava vaṇṇakkakkūli taravukūli Uṭpaṭa Antarāyamum maṟṟum Epper (r)ppaṭṭaṉavum patiṉaiñcāva
tiṉetirāmāṇṭu mutal kaikkoṇṭu Amutupaṭi Uḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭum nivantaṅkaḷ cellappaṇṇuka Ivai
ceḻiyataraiyaṉeḻuttu yāṇṭu patiṉaiñcāvatiṉetirāmāṇṭu nāḷ paṉṉiraṇ ṭiṉāl Ivai Uyya va
nta perumāḷeḻuttu svastistu
Digital edition of SII 26.523 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
